channel.title: script on Piotr Adamus blog
channel.description: Recent content in script on Piotr Adamus blog

item.title: Python and zip archives
item.description: A problem I got a task at work to provide bank statements for the audit to the auditor. Each of the zipped bank statement archives includes hundreds of the bank statements (and yet you have a 12 periods to search for). What a tedious job but it must be done ! A concept of solution Each bank statement was named with regular pattern- what made things easier for me. I found that the best and the most efficient way to solve it is to:
